channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: SpaceX will join Nasdaq-100
item.description: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.

item.title: U.S. strikes Iran after Trump accuses Tehran of ceasefire violation in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The attack comes as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-period of no hostilities as they hold talks to end their war.

item.title: Trump admin allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI model to some companies, government agencies
item.description: Anthropic disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with a government export control directive citing "national security authorities."

item.title: Venezuela quake toll tops 900, search intensifies for hundreds trapped
item.description: Frustration has mounted over the uneven pace of relief in some of the hardest-hit areas.

item.title: From concerts to train rides, bots are winning the ticket wars — but they're only part of the problem
item.description: From concerts to train reservations, automated bots have become the latest target in the fight against ticket scalping.

item.title: Saudi Aramco resumes oil loading at Ras Tanura in boost to supply
item.description: The Saudi oil loadings come even though a ship belonging to Taiwan's Evergreen Marine was hit by an unknown object in the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday.

item.title: U.S. crude oil falls below $70, resuming losses after attack on cargo ship near Oman
item.description: Oil extended declines on Friday, with markets focused any further breakthroughs in the Middle East conflict, while absorbing a flurry of Persian Gulf news.

item.title: Wall Street is set to close the books on a memorable first half next week. Here's what's ahead
item.description: The view is more rosy than investors could have expected, as they wrap up the month, quarter, and first half of 2026 next week.

item.title: Red-alert heatwaves are becoming Europe's new normal. Investors are paying attention
item.description: Temperature records were smashed across Europe this week, prompting several countries across the continent to issued high-level warnings about danger to life.

item.title: China industrial profits stay resilient as economy leans on factories, exports
item.description: China's economic growth remains fragile, hobbled by a prolonged property downturn and deep structural imbalances.

item.title: OpenAI hasn't held pre-IPO investor meetings or set timeline yet, sources say
item.description: OpenAI said it confidentially filed its prospectus with the SEC earlier this month, but noted it "may be a while" before it goes public.

item.title: OpenAI limits new AI models to 'trusted partners' at request of U.S. government
item.description: OpenAI said it previewed the new models' capabilities with the government ahead of the launch.

item.title: Trump eases pressure on Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh as inflation tops 4%
item.description: President Donald Trump's economic advisors are giving Warsh space, as the new Fed chairman, on interest rates as the president repeats calls to cut.

item.title: Oracle stock has worst week since 2001 dot-com bust as AI financing concerns escalate
item.description: Oracle's surging spending, negative free cash flow and $130 billion debt pile are weighing on the stock.

item.title: A breakout could be in the cards for this biopharmaceutical play, says Carter Worth
item.description: Shares of Incyte are now moving out of a seven-month range.

item.title: Jeremy Grantham says this is the most expensive market in 'American history'
item.description: Jeremy Grantham says soaring valuations around AI makes the U.S. stock market historically expensive.

item.title: China's Zhipu is closing in on top U.S. AI models with Anthropic and OpenAI held back
item.description: Zhipu's GLM 5.2 shows the AI fight is shifting to who delivers the most intelligence per dollar, making open source suddenly a real contender.

item.title: Rubio says Israel, Lebanon reach framework agreement aimed at 'lasting peace and security'
item.description: Israel and Lebanon agreed to implement a ceasefire. But that is contingent on the paramilitary group Hezbollah agreeing to halt hostilities.

item.title: Boost portfolio income in the second half of 2026 with these cheap dividend payers
item.description: In an expensive stock market, these stocks pay investors to wait for potential upside. They are also well-liked by Wall Street.

item.title: Walmart heir Lukas Walton buys minority stake in the Chicago Bulls and United Center
item.description: Lukas Walton is the 39-year-old grandson of Walmart founder Sam Walton. He and his wife, Samantha, are residents of Chicago.

item.title: Healthcare stocks have caught fire, sending all 3 of our names to record highs
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: Last chance: Earn up to 90,000 bonus points with these Southwest credit card offers
item.description: These Southwest cards provide several benefits that make earning a Companion Pass much easier.

item.title: Gavin Newsom calls for national billionaires tax: 'It's time for an economic reset'
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom said he supports imposing "a true minimum tax on billionaires" and closing "tax-free lifestyle loan" loopholes for the rich.

item.title: Trump threatens 100% tariffs on countries putting 'Digital Services Tax on American Companies'
item.description: "This TARIFF will supersede Trade Deals made with the Country, whether implemented, signed, or not," President Donald Trump wrote in a Truth Social post.

item.title: Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari says he expects a rate hike this year
item.description: Kashkari said he sees a hike likely this year as the economy continues to feel the hit from spiking inflation.

item.title: Billionaire investor Jeremy Grantham says bitcoin will 'dwindle away with a whimper'
item.description: Jeremy Grantham renewed his long-running criticism of bitcoin, predicting it will gradually fade into irrelevance over decades.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Moderna, ON Semiconductor, Rocket Lab, Eli Lilly, Sandisk & more
item.description: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Leon Black refuses to answer questions on NDAs at Jeffrey Epstein hearing, Rep. Comer says
item.description: "I knew Jekyll. I didn't know Hyde," Leon Black says about Jeffrey Epstein in his prepared statement to the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee.

item.title: Ex-Trump advisor John Bolton pleads guilty to retaining national defense information
item.description: John Bolton is one of several foes of President Donald Trump who has been indicted since Trump regained the White House.

item.title: CNBC's Most Valuable Sports Empires 2026: Here's how the world's top 20 stack up
item.description: The world's 20 most valuable sports ownership groups are worth a combined $269 billion, according to CNBC's Most Valuable Sports Empires 2026.
